/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/projectforge.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/projectforge.dir/src/DatabaseInitializer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/projectforge.dir/src/Main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/projectforge.dir/src/PluginLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/projectforge.dir/src/ProjectForgeConfig.cpp.o CMakeFiles/projectforge.dir/src/ProjectForgeServer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/projectforge.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o projectforge  ../projectforge-common/libprojectforge_common.a ../projectforge-model/libprojectforge_model.a ../projectforge-jcr/libprojectforge_jcr.a ../projectforge-business/libprojectforge_business.a ../projectforge-rest/libprojectforge_rest.a ../projectforge-carddav/libprojectforge_carddav.a ../projectforge-idp/libprojectforge_idp.a ../projectforge-wicket/libprojectforge_wicket.a ../_deps/spdlog-build/libspdlog.a ../projectforge-rest/libprojectforge_rest.a /usr/lib/libbrotlicommon.so /usr/lib/libbrotlienc.so /usr/lib/libbrotlidec.so /usr/lib/libz.so /usr/lib/libssl.so /usr/lib/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/libssl.so /usr/lib/libcrypto.so ../projectforge-business/libprojectforge_business.a ../projectforge-common/libprojectforge_common.a ../projectforge-model/libprojectforge_model.a ../projectforge-jcr/libprojectforge_jcr.a /usr/lib/libsqlite3.so ../_deps/spdlog-build/libspdlog.a
